'''鈭歱-n-l''' ('''kapanal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dubble|dubble]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-n-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dubble|dubble]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-n-l
|-
! Lemma
| kapanal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipanal|thipanal]] || [[word:jipanal|jipanal]] || [[word:shipanal|shipanal]] || [[word:kipanal|kipanal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupanal|thuthupanal]] || [[word:jujupanal|jujupanal]] || [[word:shushupanal|shushupanal]] || [[word:kukupanal|kukupanal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupanal|thupanal]] || [[word:jupanal|jupanal]] || [[word:shupanal|shupanal]] || [[word:kupanal|kupanal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupanal|thupanal]] || [[word:jupanal|jupanal]] || [[word:shupanal|shupanal]] || [[word:kupanal|kupanal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepanal|thepanal]] || [[word:jepanal|jepanal]] || [[word:shepanal|shepanal]] || [[word:kepanal|kepanal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopanal|thothopanal]] || [[word:jojopanal|jojopanal]] || [[word:shoshopanal|shoshopanal]] || [[word:kokopanal|kokopanal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopanal|thopanal]] || [[word:jopanal|jopanal]] || [[word:shopanal|shopanal]] || [[word:kopanal|kopanal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopanal|thopanal]] || [[word:jopanal|jopanal]] || [[word:shopanal|shopanal]] || [[word:kopanal|kopanal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:panal|panal]] || [[word:panal|panal]] || [[word:panal|panal]] || [[word:panal|panal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:panal|panal]] || [[word:panal|panal]] || [[word:panal|panal]] || [[word:panal|panal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:panal|panal]] || [[word:panal|panal]] || [[word:panal|panal]] || [[word:panal|panal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:panal|panal]] || [[word:panal|panal]] || [[word:panal|panal]] || [[word:panal|panal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙panal|th忙panal]] || [[word:j忙panal|j忙panal]] || [[word:sh忙panal|sh忙panal]] || [[word:k忙panal|k忙panal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapanal|thathapanal]] || [[word:jajapanal|jajapanal]] || [[word:shashapanal|shashapanal]] || [[word:kakapanal|kakapanal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapanal|thapanal]] || [[word:japanal|japanal]] || [[word:shapanal|shapanal]] || [[word:kapanal|kapanal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapanal|thapanal]] || [[word:japanal|japanal]] || [[word:shapanal|shapanal]] || [[word:kapanal|kapanal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapanal|shapanal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapanal|goshapanal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapanal|gokishapanal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapanaln眉|shapanaln眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapanalnkn眉|goshapanalnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapanaln眉|gokishapanaln眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapanalsh毛|shapanalsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapanalnksh毛|goshapanalnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapanalsh毛|gokishapanalsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapanalro|shapanalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapanalnkro|goshapanalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapanalro|gokishapanalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapanalmu|shapanalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapanalnkmu|goshapanalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapanalmu|gokishapanalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapanalsher|shapanalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapanalnksher|goshapanalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapanalsher|gokishapanalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapanalng|shapanalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapanalnkng|goshapanalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapanalng|gokishapanalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapanalya|shapanalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapanalnkya|goshapanalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapanalya|gokishapanalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapanalyam|shapanalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapanalnkyam|goshapanalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapanalyam|gokishapanalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapanaln眉sh毛|shapanaln眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapanalnkn眉sh毛|goshapanalnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapanaln眉sh毛|gokishapanaln眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapanaln眉ro|shapanaln眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapanalnkn眉ro|goshapanalnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapanaln眉ro|gokishapanaln眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapanaln眉mu|shapanaln眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapanalnkn眉mu|goshapanalnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapanaln眉mu|gokishapanaln眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapanalsh毛n眉|shapanalsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapanalnksh毛n眉|goshapanalnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapanalsh毛n眉|gokishapanalsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapanalsh毛ro|shapanalsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapanalnksh毛ro|goshapanalnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapanalsh毛ro|gokishapanalsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapanalsh毛mu|shapanalsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapanalnksh毛mu|goshapanalnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapanalsh毛mu|gokishapanalsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapanalron眉|shapanalron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapanalnkron眉|goshapanalnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapanalron眉|gokishapanalron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapanalrosh毛|shapanalrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapanalnkrosh毛|goshapanalnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapanalrosh毛|gokishapanalrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapanalromu|shapanalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapanalnkromu|goshapanalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapanalromu|gokishapanalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapanalmun眉|shapanalmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapanalnkmun眉|goshapanalnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapanalmun眉|gokishapanalmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapanalmush毛|shapanalmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapanalnkmush毛|goshapanalnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapanalmush毛|gokishapanalmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapanalmuro|shapanalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapanalnkmuro|goshapanalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapanalmuro|gokishapanalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
